title: Zephyr/C impl: Gateway-centric announce suppression
description:
Implement gateway-centric announce suppression in Zephyr/C firmware.

## Files to modify
- lichen/subsys/lichen/ (locate announce and RPL code)

## Changes
1. Track DODAG parent state (already exists for RPL)
2. Parse gateway-centric flag from DIO options
3. Announce timer uses dynamic interval based on DODAG state
4. On DODAG loss, schedule resume to normal interval

## Kconfig
- CONFIG_LICHEN_ANNOUNCE_INTERVAL_NORMAL=300
- CONFIG_LICHEN_ANNOUNCE_INTERVAL_GATEWAY=1800
- CONFIG_LICHEN_DODAG_LOSS_RESUME_TIMEOUT=60

## State machine
ORPHAN (300s interval) -> DODAG_JOINED (1800s interval) -> ORPHAN (300s within 60s)
close_reason: Gateway-centric mode implemented across simulator, Rust, C/Zephyr, scale test: DIO flag parsed and propagated to DodagState, announce scheduler uses dynamic interval (300s normal, 1800s gateway) with reschedule on state change and 60s grace on DODAG loss, LOADng fallback enforced in routing decision when gradients stale, all tests pass including interop and scale (4% overhead), spec conformance verified.
